packageRules.description: Calcite + its core transitives upgrade as one set — bumping calcite-core alone usually drags incompatible avatica / janino versions; force them to ride together.
Jackson core + databind + dataformats stay aligned to one minor version — mixed-minor Jackson is a classic NoSuchMethodError trap.
OpenTelemetry api / sdk / sdk-testing must move as one unit.
Arrow / ADBC clusters — JNI shim, driver-manager, vector, jdbc-adapter all share a release train.
Auto-merge patch bumps after CI is green. Minor / major bumps still require human review since they routinely include API breaks even when the changelog claims they don't.
Test-only deps (mockito, hsqldb, duckdb_jdbc, junit, surefire) can move ahead of production deps — they only block CI, not deployments. Minor upgrades auto-merge here too.
GitHub Actions: action versions ride a fast cadence; group + auto-merge minor / patch.
Maven plugins — same deal as GitHub Actions; usually safe to ride patch / minor.
